name: Laura Bennett
title: Home & Travel Reviewer
bio: Laura covers home organization, kitchen, and travel-gear categories, testing products in her own household before they're rated.
longBio: Laura Bennett is TrailNestCo's Home & Travel Reviewer, covering home organization, kitchen tools, luggage, and everyday-carry gear. She holds a background in interior design and spent three years writing product comparisons for a home-goods marketplace. Laura tests every product in real household use for a minimum of two weeks before publishing a review, and maintains TrailNestCo's internal scoring rubric for durability, ease of use, and value.
